$schema_note: Code-health ratchet budget. Each entry under 'files' maps a source file to its grandfathered ceiling (its physical line count when first recorded). RULE: files may only SHRINK. A file may never exceed its recorded budget; when a refactor shrinks it, lower the budget to match (run `python scripts/check_code_health.py --update` or edit by hand). Any new/unlisted source file must stay under 'global_ceiling'. See docs/CODE_HEALTH.md.
